'''ngajozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygophile|pygophile]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygophile|pygophile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngajozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ngæjezeth || ngæjezej || ngæjezesh || ngæjeze
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || ngajojozoth || ngajojozoj || ngajojozosh || ngajojozo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || ngajozoth || ngajozoj || ngajozosh || ngajozo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || ngajofzofth || ngajofzofj || ngajofzofsh || ngajofzof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ngajozotho || ngajozojo || ngajozosho || ngajozoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || ngajozoth || ngajozoj || ngajozosh || ngajozo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ngajozothol || ngajozojol || ngajozoshol || ngajozokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ngajozoothotho || ngajozoojojo || ngajozooshosho || ngajozooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || ngajozothon || ngajozojon || ngajozoshon || ngajozokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ngajozothooro || ngajozojooro || ngajozoshooro || ngajozokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
